nasb.text: The one among the servants of Pharaoh who feared the word of the Lord made his servants and his livestock flee into the houses;

esv.text: Then whoever feared the word of the Lord among the servants of Pharaoh hurried his slaves and his livestock into the houses,

cnv.text: 法老的臣僕中有懼怕耶和華這話的，就叫他的僕人和牲畜進屋裡來。

ccb.text: 有些法老的臣仆听了耶和华的话就很害怕，赶忙把在田间的仆人和牲畜都召回屋里。
